recommendations.title: House by the River

recommendations.title: Hawking

recommendations.title: Bob Marley: One Love
recommendations.overview: Jamaican singer-songwriter Bob Marley overcomes adversity to become the most famous reggae musician in the world.

recommendations.title: The Theory of Everything
recommendations.overview: The Theory of Everything is the extraordinary story of one of the world’s greatest living minds, the renowned astrophysicist Stephen Hawking, who falls deeply in love with fellow Cambridge student Jane Wilde.

recommendations.title: The Child in Time

recommendations.title: Shattered Glass

recommendations.title: Tale of Tales
recommendations.overview: Distant, well-worn memories of childhood are inhabited by a little gray wolf. Through astonishing imagery, the memory of all of Russia is depicted.

recommendations.title: Escape from Pretoria
recommendations.overview: South Africa, 1978. Tim Jenkin and Stephen Lee, two white political activists from the African National Congress imprisoned by the apartheid regime, put a plan in motion to escape from the infamous Pretoria Prison.

recommendations.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
